pattern: Scan once tracking the length of the current strictly increasing run, resetting whenever the order breaks, and keep the best run seen.
hints: The answer must be a contiguous block, so only adjacent comparisons matter.
Walk left to right keeping a running length; extend it when the next value is strictly larger, otherwise start a fresh run of length one.
Record the maximum running length over the whole pass and return it.

edge_inputs.description: single element is its own run
all equal so no strict increase ever happens
strictly decreasing so every run is length one
longer overall subsequence is broken by a dip
equal neighbor must break the run, not extend it
best run is in the middle

stress.description: random values with frequent resets to exercise run tracking
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [[rng.randint(-50, 50) for _ in range(size)]]
